hero.title: KMK GROUP SARL

hero.description: A diversified business group committed to agriculture, livestock, construction and more for the sustainable development of our region.

flagship.title: Flagship Project
flagship.subtitle: 100 Hectares of Modern Agriculture
flagship.description: Our flagship agricultural project represents an investment of 205 million FCFA on 100 hectares of fertile land, combining agriculture, livestock and processing.

why.transparency_desc: Rigorous management and regular reporting for our partners

cta.title: Ready to invest with us?
cta.description: Join KMK GROUP and participate in the economic growth of our region.

about.title: About KMK GROUP
about.subtitle: Our story, our vision
about.description: KMK GROUP SARL is a multi-activity business group founded with the vision of contributing to the economic and social development of our region.
about.story_p2: Founded with the conviction that sustainable economic development is possible, KMK GROUP SARL has diversified its activities while maintaining strong strategic coherence around shared values.
about.vision_text: To become the reference group in West Africa in the sectors of agriculture, livestock, construction and services.
about.mission_text: Create lasting value by developing responsible economic activities that benefit our clients, partners and communities in Côte d'Ivoire and the sub-region.

activities.title: Our Activities
activities.subtitle: A diversified portfolio for solid growth
activities.agriculture_desc: Cassava, yam, corn and cash crops on 100 hectares of fertile land using modern and sustainable techniques to maximize yields while preserving the environment.
activities.elevage_desc: Diversified livestock farming including beekeeping, fish farming, poultry (chicken coops), goat farming (caprine), cattle (beef) and grasscutter farming (agouti). Varied production meeting local and regional market needs.
activities.reboisement_desc: Reforestation and environmental protection program for a sustainable future, contributing to the fight against climate change and the preservation of local ecosystems.
activities.construction_desc: Residential, commercial and public infrastructure projects with quality materials.
activities.location_desc: Fleet of modern vehicles available for individuals and businesses, with or without driver.
activities.audiovisuel_desc: Rental of advertising spaces and billboards in strategic locations across Abidjan. Give your brand maximum visibility by renting our display spaces at high-traffic locations.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: Concrete achievements for lasting impact
projects.flagship_desc: Our flagship intensive farming and livestock project on 100 hectares represents KMK GROUP's ambition for agricultural development.
projects.agri_desc: Food crops (cassava, yam, corn) and cash crops on 60 hectares with drip irrigation system.
projects.elevage_desc: Cattle and poultry farming (broilers, laying hens) on 30 hectares. Cold chain and slaughterhouse to health standards.
projects.transform_desc: Agricultural and livestock processing unit to create added value and reduce post-harvest losses.
projects.btp_section_desc: KMK GROUP is developing ambitious real estate and infrastructure projects to meet the growing needs of the region.
projects.hotel_desc: Construction of a R+2 hotel with 50 rooms in the interior of Côte d'Ivoire. Estimated budget between 510 and 790 million FCFA. Includes structural work, room equipment (air conditioning, TV, bathrooms), restaurant, reception and conference room.
projects.clinic_desc: Construction of a R+4 clinic in Abidjan. Estimated budget between 645 million and 1.25 billion FCFA. Includes structural work, biomedical equipment (imaging, operating room, laboratory), generator, centralised air conditioning and medical furniture.
projects.supermarket_desc: Construction of a large modern supermarket with parking, offering a wide range of food and non-food products.

invest.subtitle: Join a promising entrepreneurial venture

invest.reason1_desc: Estimated ROI between 15% and 25% depending on investment sectors.
invest.reason2_desc: Solid legal framework, transparent contracts and regular reporting.
invest.reason3_desc: Management with over 5 years of experience in our sectors.
invest.reason4_desc: Responsible investment with positive social and environmental impact.
